## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential partnership between Boost My School and GrowthX for content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX aims to start publishing content within 2 weeks of kickoff, emphasizing rapid calibration and execution](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Phased approach: 1) Establish content production system, 2) Scale and refine, 3) Optimize conversion paths](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Target kickoff for second week of October, pending internal processes and reference check](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Boost My School to migrate blog to Webflow CMS before engagement starts, if possible](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Process Overview

  - [Kickoff meeting to gather context on business, target audience, and goals](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Week 1: Access setup, document ingestion, research, and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Week 2: Calibration articles for feedback, aiming to publish 1-2 pieces](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Week 3 onward: Full production (e.g., 10 articles/week) based on agreed scope](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### Success Metrics and Phases

1.  Reliable content production and early signals (impressions, low-ranking keywords)
2.  Traffic growth, click-through rates, content performance analysis
3.  Conversion optimization, exploring lead magnets or direct sign-ups
4.  Cohort analysis of user activation and monetization

### Client Collaboration

  - [Provide examples of desired content style and format](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Share detailed product information to ensure accurate feature representation](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Offer insights on target market and customer needs](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Weekly sync meetings, with emphasis on asynchronous communication](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Importance of resolving sitemap issues, page speed, and indexing blockers](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Preference for publishing through a CMS like Webflow for easier integration](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Tentative kickoff planned for second week of October](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Hudson to conduct reference check with Mitchell from Swugo](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Holman to connect with Tom from Project Mark for additional insights](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to follow up with Mitchell for reference check connection](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [Hudson to complete internal processes and confirm kickoff timing](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Boost My School to work on Webflow CMS migration for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Schedule official kickoff meeting once timeline is confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/eASSNd4xZMYtSpSNgBmk9uyAqov8mfPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
